title: Prism Optimized
description: Boosts FPS and provides smooth gameplay
body:
Prism Optimized is a pure performance modpack for Minecraft 1.21, built exclusively around FPS, stability and efficiency. It combines both well-known and frequently overlooked optimization mods that deliver real improvements to frame rate, RAM usage, CPU load and chunk loading speed.

Unlike most optimization packs, Prism contains zero gameplay or client mods - only carefully selected performance tools. This keeps it lightweight, conflict-free and makes it an ideal foundation to build your own modpack on top of without worrying about incompatibilities.

What sets Prism apart is the depth of its selection. Most players install Sodium and stop there. Prism goes further, including mods that handle memory allocation, entity rendering, startup time and chunk generation — the things that actually cause stutters and lag spikes on mid and low-end systems.

If your game stutters, drops frames or feels heavier than it should - drop Prism in and notice the difference.


Want a custom modpack built for your needs? Check out my Fiverr gig: https://www.fiverr.com/s/Ay5jzlq
